creator: amdmi3@FreeBSD.org
text:
I've already written that in the first message.

I wanted to clarify

- whether it does not build on i386 or it does not build on !amd64. These are completely different things.
- whether it's not supposed to build (as in "it depends on amd64 assembly and there's no way to make it work on i386") or it doesn't build because of a bug which may be fixed later
